/opt/homebrew/Cellar/emscripten/4.0.16/libexec/emcc -g -O0 -s WASM=1 -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=createJamCracker -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=[_jc_init,_jc_render,_jc_stop,_jc_get_song_pos,_jc_get_row,_jc_get_speed,_jc_get_tick,_jc_get_song_length,_jc_get_num_patterns,_jc_get_num_instruments,_jc_get_sample_rate,_jc_get_pattern_rows,_jc_get_pattern_cell,_jc_set_pattern_cell,_jc_get_song_entry,_jc_note_on,_jc_note_off,_jc_render_preview,_jc_save,_jc_save_ptr,_jc_save_free,_jc_set_channel_gain,_malloc,_free] -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=[ccall,cwrap,HEAPU8,HEAPF32] -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s INITIAL_MEMORY=4194304 -s STACK_SIZE=65536 -O2 @CMakeFiles/JamCracker.dir/objects1.rsp -o JamCracker.js
